author: ポール・ミルグロム / ジョン・ロバーツ
genre_label: 学術書・理論寄り教科書
strategy: Genre D academic compression with chapter-balanced essences, framework diagrams, concept tables, and critical perspective
required_min_chars_rule: Workspace skill formula for Genre D gives max(original_chars*0.02, 10000)=21039.24, but this run adopted the user's explicit floor of 21355 total output chars.
notes: Counts were re-measured after final edits.
original_chars is source.txt character count with CR/LF removed.
compressed_chars and structure_map_chars include newlines; *_no_newlines fields remove CR/LF.
total_output_chars_no_newlines = compressed-reading.md + structure-map.md after CR/LF removal.
source.txt was read completely in offset/limit chunks from line 1 through line 15797 with no intentional skips.
The total output no-newline count 21564 clears both the skill floor (21039.24) and the user's requested floor (21355).
